# MousePointer

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::MousePointer;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        MousePointer { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
click, select

## Categories
arrows, cursors

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/mouse-pointer)
